framework.FileNotExistContent: File not found, check the file path
framework.FileConflictContent: The imported file conflicts with the original file of the project. Continuing to import will overwrite the original file
framework.FileUnsafeContent: The imported file is not a safe route and cannot be imported.
framework.LargeFileContent: The file is too large, and there may be cases of slow loading or OOM (out of memory). If you continue, please click 'confirm'.
framework.PathLengthExceededContent: Path length exceeds the maximum limit allowed by the operating system, which may cause parsing to fail. Please check the file name or file depth. To ignore and continue parsing, please click 'confirm'.
framework.Duplicate Project: Project name already exists, modification of project name failed
framework.Set Comparison Data Out Of Range: Set Comparison Data Out Of Range!
framework.Baseline Conflict: Can't set baseline and comparison data to be the same
framework.PathNotFound: The file at path '{{path}}' was not found
framework.No cluster data available in Baseline: No cluster data available in Baseline
framework.No cluster data available in Comparison: No cluster data available in Comparison
framework.Open a Project as Comparison Data: Please open a Project as Comparison Data first

tabs.TimelineSystemTooltip: System Tuning: Chronologically visualizes host-device execution details on a timeline, correlating API latencies on host with task durations on device to identify bottlenecks, while providing filtering and optimization recommendations, sourced from trace_view.json, msprof_*.json, operator_details.csv, among others
tabs.TimelineOperatorTooltip: Operator Tuning: Chronologically visualizes detailed instruction execution on a timeline, revealing invocation sequences and latency metrics per Pipe across all AI processor Cores, sourced from *trace.json and visualize_data.bin files
tabs.TimelineServiceTooltip: Service-Oriented Tuning: Visualizes the execution status of key phases and end-to-end performance metrics in AI inference serving processes, enabling developers to rapidly identify system-level bottlenecks such as request scheduling inefficiencies, NPU memory management (e.g., KVCache allocation), and suboptimal batching strategies (e.g., BatchSchedule latency), sourced from chrome_tracing.json and profiler.db files
tabs.MemoryTooltip: The memory information during the collection process is visualized through a line chart generated from the memory_record.csv, npu_module_mem.csv, or static_op_mem.csv files, while the detailed memory allocation/release table is sourced from the operator_memory.csv file
tabs.OperatorTooltip: Analyzes computing and communication operator execution metrics, sourced from kernel_details.csv files
tabs.SummaryTooltip: Provides communication group identification, partitioning, and time breakdown analysis capabilities, sourced from cluster_step_trace_time.csv files
tabs.CommunicationTooltip: Visualizes network-wide link performance and node-level communication metrics across the cluster, sourced from cluster_communication_matrix.json and cluster_communication.json files
tabs.SourceTooltip: Visualizes operator instruction heatmaps, supporting analysis of source code-to-instruction set mappings and cycle consumption metrics, sourced from .bin files
tabs.DetailsTooltip: Visualizes operator basic information, computing unit workload, and Roofline bottleneck analysis metrics, sourced from .bin files
tabs.CacheTooltip: Visualizes L2 Cache access patterns within user program kernel functions via heatmap, sourced from .bin files
tabs.StatisticTooltip: Visualizes dynamic metrics of service-oriented tuning in line charts and tables, sourced from profiler.db files
tabs.LeaksTooltip: Visualizes memory usage trends during memory tuning processes, sourced from leaks_dump_*.db
tabs.JupyterTooltip: Integrated with the Jupyter interface, enabling online editing and execution of ipynb files, with data sourced from ipynb files
tabs.RLTooltip: Visualize control flow timelines from collected data to quickly spot long-running tasks and bubbles, enabling deeper performance analysis.

shortcuts.M selection: Set or unset the temporary selection based on the current selected operator
shortcuts.L align: Align the selected operator's start time with the benchmark operator's start time
shortcuts.R align: Align the selected operator's end time with the benchmark operator's end time

framework.ImportExpertHotspotDataTips: Please select the directory or file containing MoE expert heatmap data
